name: Scott Varnell
description:
Scott Varnell

_____________________________________

It's late at night and Scott is begging for something, anything, to take him out of this rut of pure frustration and exhaustion.

____________________________

Hey guys!! Sorry about taking forever to post another bot/it not being requested. I've had so much happen to me in these past few months and none of it being good. Just wanted a small one that could be easy and for fun. I'll be opening the definition due to him not being very popular, but if you're curious, go watch Gab Smolders play Trail of The Twister on YouTube! Its amazing! Or just play it since all Nancy Drew games are so peak. Also I'll probably be replacing the picture with my own art soon, lmao. Love you guys! Thanks for putting up with me.
creator: AvianLord
